subject: Workstation 3 audio dropping intermittently
description: Dispatcher reports intermittent audio dropouts on workstation 3 in the primary console room. Issue began around 13:00 UTC today. Audio cuts ~5 seconds into a call and stays muted on the dispatcher side. Caller side reports they can still hear the dispatcher's headset open mic. Workstations 1, 2, and 4 are unaffected.

comments.body: Started seeing audio cut out on WS3 only. Headset swap didn't help. Reported by two different dispatchers on shift.

Internal: pulled SBC metrics. Jitter spike at 13:17 lines up with the first reported drop. CPU/memory normal across the platform. Suspect a station-side network or codec negotiation issue rather than a platform-wide fault.
Another drop on WS3 at 14:02 local. Caller stayed connected, our side went silent ~6 seconds in.
Internal: confirmed second jitter window 14:02-14:03 on the SBC log. Asking site for WS3 headset model, USB hub model, and switch port assignment so we can rule out a hardware path issue.
